query:
SELECT pm.id, pm.postId, pm.mediaUrl, pm.mediaType, p.status, p.theme
FROM post_media pm
JOIN posts p ON p.id = pm.postId
ORDER BY pm.id DESC LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3F5sJN7FajWtXbb.root --database 3LYkMyiPgdB2gzxf44Hk3M --execute SELECT pm.id, pm.postId, pm.mediaUrl, pm.mediaType, p.status, p.theme
FROM post_media pm
JOIN posts p ON p.id = pm.postId
ORDER BY pm.id DESC LIMIT 10;
